goal: Make the operations center feel practical by restructuring it around daily operational actions rather than raw maintenance forms.
deliverable: A benchmark-informed operations workbench that prioritizes replenishment, exceptions, import recovery, invoice follow-up, and data gaps while preserving full maintenance capabilities.
constraints: Stay within the current frontend architecture
Do not expand scope into new backend reporting domains
acceptance_criteria: Action-first workbench sections are visible before maintenance forms
Navigation and page copy consistently describe the feature as an operations workbench
Project validation and a source smoke test both pass
non_goals: New backend analytics or supplier scoring logic
